//: Emulator-only Firebase config for rules tests + CI. Mirrors the Firestore/Storage parts of firebase.json but omits the `hosting` block. With framework-aware hosting (hosting.source = frontend) in firebase.json, `firebase emulators:exec` tries to detect/emulate the Next.js web framework and fails unless the webframeworks experiment is enabled. The rules suite only needs Firestore + Storage, so it runs against this config via --config. Lives at repo root so rules paths resolve inside the project dir.
